# Third-Party Source Packages

This directory stores as-received source packages for third-party software that
requires source-availability tracking for `nvidia-nat-harbor`.

## pathspec 1.1.0

- File: `pathspec-1.1.0.tar.gz`
- License: Mozilla Public License Version 2.0 (`MPL-2.0`)
- Upstream source repository: <https://github.com/cpburnz/python-pathspec>
- PyPI release: <https://pypi.org/project/pathspec/1.1.0/>
- PyPI source distribution URL:
  <https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/2e/17/9c3094b822982b9f1ea666d8580ce59000f61f87c1663556fb72031ad9ec/pathspec-1.1.0.tar.gz>
- SHA256:
  `f5d7c555da02fd8dde3e4a2354b6aba817a89112fa8f333f7917a2a4834dd080`

The tarball is stored without NVIDIA modifications.
